description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image (build-project overrides to node:8) with a global cache of node_modules. Define a build-project job that runs on the master and develop branches, uses image node:8, executes apt-get update, apt-get -yq install chromium git, npm install -g bower grunt-cli, npm install, bower install --allow-root, grunt test, find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN, and grunt release; it stores coverage/, doc/ and dist/ as artifacts for 1 day and extracts coverage percentage with the given regex. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on master, uses the global node:latest image, depends on build-project, runs ls -l, mkdir .public, moves coverage/ and doc/ into .public, renames .public to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact for 90 days.
